name: Hou Create Node
description: Create a new node in the live Houdini session. Specify the parent path (e.g. /obj), node type (e.g. geo, cam, null), and optional name.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    from src.utils.hou_bridge import get_bridge

    parent = inputs.get('parent') or self.get_parameter('parent', '/obj')
    node_type = inputs.get('node_type') or self.get_parameter('node_type', 'geo')
    name = inputs.get('name') or self.get_parameter('name', '')

    try:
        bridge = get_bridge()
        result = bridge.create_node(parent, node_type, name)
        path = result['path']
        self.log_info(f'Created Houdini node: {path} (type: {result["type"]})')
        await self.set_output('node_path', path)
    except Exception as e:
        self.log_error(f'Failed to create node: {e}')
        await self.set_output('node_path', '')

    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'node_path': self.get_parameter('node_path', '')}
